Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Captain]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Captain is said to be Soulbound to his ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — The Captain's mind is Elder-touched.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — The Captain intends to head for the Capital.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Captain is a rank that can be confused between Navigator captains and military captains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Calder is a Captain.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The little girl has hair redder than the Captain's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri refers to Calder as the Captain.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Captain told Lindon he was free to go.}}

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The Captain is undergoing various rounds of examination.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Captain directs the crew and awakens the ship's power core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Horizon addresses the narrator as Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The Captain is the leader of the crew on The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — The protagonist has been accepted as the Captain of the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — The Captain is the narrator of the chapter.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — The position of Captain on The Last Horizon has a different significance than usual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — The Captain is a provisional crew member.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Captain wears a white exercise outfit with blue-green highlights and a seven-pointed star on the chest after Horizon re-fabricates his clothes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Captain is a character who has been advised by Shyrax to choose a new crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Captain has failed their crew in previous lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Captain anticipated the ambush and prepared the battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — The death of the Captain would cause Horizon to go dormant.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — The narrator is addressed as Captain by Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — The narrator is the Captain of the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Raion addresses the narrator as Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Horizon addresses Varic as Captain.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Captain has eyes that blaze silver and wears a hood and mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Captain threatens to go to war with the Galactic Union.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Captain uses magic and has a staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Captain uses a staff that can be stored in crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — The narrator is addressing a Captain.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
